calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-14-2022 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-31-2022 Continued To Nov-14-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Samantha Sales, via Zoom, for James Edwards, Personal Representative.

The court queries Ms. Sales regarding the failure to address the Examiner's notes. Ms. Sales reports on the several outstanding Examiner's notes including, but not limited to, identifying the dollar amount of the distribution; an administrative error which states statutory fees to the PR, not to the attorney; having the VIN for the Estate vehicle; confirming that the title of the newly purchased real property is titled in the estate name. Ms. Sales offers to file a supplement to clear the notes. The court instructs that it will continue this matter to allow Ms. Sales to file a supplement as describe above, which must be filed by the next calling of this matter.

The subject matter is continued to Nov-14-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.
